purpose: R-W3-RATCHET-1: the exact failing/erroring tests of the focused 17-module command at slice-0 landing, measured in the PINNED context: the clean patched worktree (branch tip + the slice final patch), with failure fingerprints. tests/contracts/test_correction_ratchet.py (slice 1) enforces: current failures must be a subset of this ledger AT (test id, fingerprint) granularity; the ledger only SHRINKS (a fixed test is removed in the slice that fixes it); a new fingerprint inside an already-red test is a NEW failure and reddens. setUpClass masks carry an explicit unmask rule. Full-suite green (empty ledger) is required at slice 10.
command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python -m unittest -v tests.contracts.test_bootstrap_red_ref tests.contracts.test_page_archetype tests.contracts.test_design_source_provenance tests.contracts.test_official_source_parity tests.contracts.test_reference_pack tests.contracts.test_dashboard_visual_authority tests.contracts.test_dom_cover tests.contracts.test_page_manifest tests.contracts.test_theme_continuity tests.contracts.test_rendered_facts tests.contracts.test_rendered_fact_adversarial tests.contracts.test_rendered_fact_density_adversarial tests.contracts.test_rendered_fact_paint_adversarial tests.contracts.test_skill_structure tests.contracts.test_structural_layout tests.contracts.test_scripts_layout_contract tests.contracts.test_tests_layout_contract

org_l1_stay_red.purpose: Org L1 (r3) ratchet rows: the CR arms in tests.contracts.test_org_rootwide + tests.contracts.test_process_docs_currency that stay RED BY DESIGN after the L1 landing and flip at the L2/L3/L4 step named per row. At (test id, fingerprint) granularity per the org L1 build packet. The slice-0 failing/totals/command measurement above is UNCHANGED (the five structural_layout identities plus the two tests_layout_contract identities). These two modules are not part of the slice-0 17-module command, so they are held in this distinct ledger; the pre-commit runner (run_pinned_guards.py) pins only test_doc_authority + test_structural_layout and never runs these arms.
